title: Connect Columns: data displayed on cllick cannot be customized

posts.author: yossir.rousso (Yossi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi Community,

When using Connect Boards, clicking on a connected item opens an item card. Currently, the displayed data inside that pop-up cannot be customized. This often leads to information overload (too many irrelevant columns showing), or missing context (the important fields are buried).

Feature Request:
Allow board owners to choose which columns are displayed when clicking a connected item. Ideally, this could be a simple configuration panel per Connect Column, similar to what already exists in views like the Item Card.

Sample Use Case:
I connect an Orders board to an Inventory board.
When clicking on the connected Inventory item, I only want to see: Item Name, Stock, Price.
Today, the pop-up shows every column (supplier notes, internal tags, etc.)—which slows users down.

What are you trying to achieve

Having customizable displays when clicking to view a connected column details would make connected data faster to read, cleaner, and more relevant to the workflow.
